title: Hospital Franchise Manager — BNCT Cancer Therapy
location: New Delhi / Gandhinagar (frequent travel across India)
about: ASPL Fusion (Agnira Sanlayan Pvt. Ltd.) is an applied plasma and neutron-systems company working on accelerator-based BNCT, domestic medical-isotope production, and industrial neutron applications, within established Indian regulatory and safety frameworks. Beyond commissioning our flagship BNCT centre, the medium-horizon plan is to extend BNCT capability through hospital-partnership arrangements across India. This role anchors that extension.
description: Build and manage the hospital-partnership network that takes BNCT from a single ASPL-operated centre to multiple hospital sites across India. Scope spans partner identification, agreement structuring, facility fit-out oversight, and ongoing partnership management.
responsibilities: Identify and evaluate hospital partners (Apollo, Fortis, Max, Manipal, and equivalent networks)
Negotiate partnership agreements covering licensing, equipment specifications, and ongoing operations
Manage ongoing partnership relationships (quality standards, clinical protocols, training)
Develop partnership operations manual and standard operating procedures
Track partnership operational and financial performance and report to leadership
Build referral networks with oncologists across India
requirements: MBA or equivalent; healthcare / hospital-management background
5+ years in healthcare partnership operations, hospital business development, or medical-device sales
Strong relationships with Indian hospital networks
Understanding of medical-technology installation and commissioning
benefits: Co-authorship on ASPL publications and patent filings (the default for technical roles)
Conference travel support (ANS, IEEE NPSS, IPAC, ASTRO, IAEA technical meetings and equivalent)
Direct mentorship from Prof. Prabhat Ranjan and Prof. Y.C. Saxena, plus weekly working-group technical syncs
Founding-team scope: shape your domain end-to-end as part of a small team scaling up
Core collaboration hours 10:00–18:00 IST with flexibility outside that window
